learnings.trigger: Patrick: 'you didn't follow the rules for authoring the human script'
learnings.rule: The coordinator NEVER supplies the script's prose. On a guard rejection, pass ONLY the guard's printed failure reasons to the script sub-agent and let it re-author; do NOT hand it verbatim replacement text to paste. Handing 'Replace X with exactly: <bullets>' is the coordinator authoring the script, which the gate forbids and which drifts the voice from naive-operator to architect.
learnings.fix_applied: Regenerated the script via a fresh sub-agent from requirements only; on guard failures, relay reasons, never prose.
